svg.text: Aruba Time | AST / UTC-4 | 24-hour match times
Version 01 | Data-driven overview | no official FIFA marks
AST = Atlantic Standard Time, UTC-4 | 1A = Group A winner | 2A = Group A runner-up | 3A* = third place if among best eight | W = winner | L = loser
Source: structured FIFA schedule seed. Verify live results before publication.
